description:
If loading screen is shown, sets progress bar to the given value (interval is from 0 to 1]).
{{Feature|arma3|The loading screen can be force-ended with the {{Link|Arma 3: Cheats#ENDLOAD|ENDLOAD cheat code}}.}}
examples:
<sqf>
startLoadingScreen ["Loading My Mission"];
// 
// batch of code
// 
progressLoadingScreen 0.25;
// 
// batch of code
// 
progressLoadingScreen 0.50;
// 
// batch of code
// 
progressLoadingScreen 0.95;
// 
// batch of code
// 
endLoadingScreen;
</sqf>
name: progressLoadingScreen
